revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿三]][[zh:六月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿三]][[zh:六月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿三]][[zh:六月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿三]][[zh:六月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 23|qq=June 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kanna (era)|en|Kanna (era)|qid=Q1327053|lt=Kanna|1=Kanna (era)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}} , {{ill|986|en|986|qid=Q23785|lt=986|1=986}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kazan|en|Emperor Kazan|qid=Q361000|lt=Emperor Kazan|1=Emperor Kazan}} disappeared from the {{ill|Seiryōden|ja|清涼殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden|1=Seiryō-den|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11251344}} with his attendants.
== Births == * Year 5 of {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1768|en|1768|qid=Q7675|lt=1768|1=1768}} ) – {{ill|Hayashi Jussai|en|Hayashi Jussai|qid=Q3128825|lt=Hayashi Jussai|1=Hayashi Jussai}} , Confucian scholar (d. {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} ) * Year 6 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|qid=Q2726|lt=July 19|1=July 19}} , {{ill|1794|en|1794|qid=Q7811|lt=1794|1=1794}} ) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|qid=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}} , Edo Bakufu {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} who led the {{ill|Tenpō Reforms|en|Tenpō Reforms|qid=Q2367979|lt=Tenpō Reforms|1=Tenpō Reforms}} (d. {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} ) * Year 10 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|qid=Q2731|lt=July 16|1=July 16}} , {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} ) – {{ill|Oguri Kozukenosuke|en|Oguri Kozukenosuke|qid=Q6526468|lt=Oguri Tadamasa|1=Oguri Kozukenosuke}} , Edo Bakufu Finance Magistrate and inspector for the {{ill|1860 Japanese Embassy to the United States|ja|万延1st year遣米使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1860 Japanese Embassy to the United States|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} ) – {{ill|Katō Hiroyuki|en|Katō Hiroyuki|qid=Q1960314|lt=Katō Hiroyuki|1=Katō Hiroyuki}} , political scientist and educator (d. {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}} ) * Year 5 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) – {{ill|Naruse Jinzo|ja|成瀬仁蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naruse Jinzo|1=Naruse Jinzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11495535}} , women's educator and founder of {{ill|Japan Women's University|en|Japan Women's University|qid=Q1143226|lt=Japan Women's University|1=Japan Women's University}} (d. {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919|1=1919}} )
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Shigehira|en|Taira no Shigehira|qid=Q710537|lt=Taira no Shigehira|1=Taira no Shigehira}} , samurai commander and son of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1157|en|1157|qid=Q19654|lt=1157|1=1157}} ) * Year 4 of {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1507|en|1507|qid=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Masamoto|en|Hosokawa Masamoto|qid=Q5365082|lt=Hosokawa Masamoto|1=Hosokawa Masamoto}} , deputy shogun (Kanrei) (b. {{ill|1466|en|1466|qid=Q6559|lt=1466|1=1466}} ) * Year 6 of {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} (Julian calendar August 1, {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}} ) – {{ill|Imagawa Ujichika|en|Imagawa Ujichika|qid=Q909023|lt=Imagawa Ujichika|1=Imagawa Ujichika}} , daimyō (b. {{ill|1473|en|1473|qid=Q6594|lt=1473|1=1473}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|22|6|24|5|23|7|6|0623|qq=}}
